pageContext.name: Tanjiro Kamado (Shake the Sword Burn Your Heart)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Tanjiro Kamado (Shake the Sword Burn Your Heart) Statue!  This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Tanjiro Kamado from Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 3.9' tall, Tanjiro is seen striking his popular pose in this colorful and dynamic statue.  Demon Slayer fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Tanjiro Kamado statue today!
